properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In Your majesty You have covered me In my darkest hour You declare Your love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's never been a day That You turned away You have always been there Every time I call

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's nowhere I could run to There's no height I could climb There's nowhere I won't find You Find You waiting

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh what a Faithful God Oh what a Faithful God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When I'm letting go You're still holding on When my faith is weak Your love's so strong

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh what a Faithful God Oh what a Faithful God Oh what a Faithful God Oh what a Faithful God You are

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh what a Faithful God Oh what a Faithful God Oh what a Faithful God Oh what a Faithful God

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh what a Faithful God (There's nowhere I could run to) Oh what a Faithful God (There's no height I could climb) Oh what a Faithful God (There's nowhere I won't find You) Oh what a Faithful God (Find You) You are
